name: Galvanic Gauntlets

effects.description: Grants resistance to electrical damage and can deliver a mild shock in melee.

description: A pair of insulated gloves with copper filaments and a hidden battery cell. Used by engineers and saboteurs.

artwork.caption: Leather gloves with visible copper wiring.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Gauntlets of Ogre Power', reimagined for science.
